rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JOHN A. PHILLIPS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 22, 2013, line 7. -DEFENDANT JOHN PHILLIPS' Motion For Sanctions. Defendant's Motion for Sanctions is DENIED. Moving party failed to show that this action and new lis pendens were filed in violation of CCP 128.7. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that sanctions may be imposed in relation to the prior action, which was dismissed before any supposed compliance with CCP 128.7(c). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MONICA D. KENNEY VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is continued to October 23, 2013. Moving party must resubmit courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than October 16, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 22, 2013, line 9. -Order To Show Cause Re: Compliance With Settlement Agreement And Modification To Settlement Agreement. rulings.Case Title: EBRAHIM POURA VS. KHADAR EL SHAWA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Enforcing Stip And/Or Setting A Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 22, 2013, line 10. -PLAINTIFF EBRAHIM POURA'S Motion For Order Enforcing Stip And/Or Setting A Trial Date. Plaintiff's Motion for Order Enforcing Stipulation and/or Setting a Trial Date is DENIED. The Court has previously ruled that Stipulation for Entry of Judgment is not Enforceable. The case is also not ripe for trial setting. Defendant shall file and serve its responsive pleading with 5 days of notice of entry of this order. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ABDEL KADAR CHENBOD et al

Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to August 29, 2013. Moving party to file response to Defendant's opposition no later than August 27, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENTES PROPERTIES, L.P. VS. TAKESHI SAKEI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 22, 2013, line 12. DEFENDANT TAKESHI SAKEI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is GRANTED per stipulation subject to (1) defendant's answer being filed no later than August 23, 2013; (2) reimbursement of $295.92 to Plaintiff no later than September 2, 2013. = (501/REQ)
